title: galium lucidum var. atlanticum
intro: Galium lucidum var. atlanticum, also known as the Atlantic Bedstraw, is a variety of flowering plant in the Bedstraw family (Rubiaceae). This plant is used in herbal medicine due to its diuretic and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally employed to treat conditions such as urinary tract infections and rheumatism. The health benefits of Galium lucidum var. atlanticum include reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of this plant may be consumed as teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
